notes: Template media list for launch outreach. Replace placeholders with researched contacts, verify beats and recent coverage before sending.

categories.name: Tech Blogs
categories.description: Writers and outlets covering startups, marketplaces, trust and safety, creator tools, and internet culture.

outlets.coverageAngle: Marketplace launch, niche platform strategy, trust and safety by design
outlets.notes: Prioritize if there is traction, funding, or strong founder story.

outlets.coverageAngle: How creator infrastructure is evolving for privacy-sensitive production
outlets.notes: Angle should be broader than pure launch news.

outlets.coverageAngle: Building a brand in an underserved category
outlets.notes: Useful if brand/design story is strong.

outlets.coverageAngle: New marketplace model for private production spaces
outlets.notes: Best with business or trend framing.

categories.name: Film & Production Publications
categories.description: Trade outlets that cover location scouting, production operations, independent filmmaking, and film business infrastructure.

outlets.coverageAngle: A new workflow tool for sourcing shoot locations faster
outlets.notes: Focus on operational value to indie productions.
Needs a smart angle, not just product announcement.

outlets.coverageAngle: Location sourcing platform for producers and scouts
Helping indie teams find viable spaces for private shoots
outlets.notes: May respond well to founder-journey framing.

categories.name: Creator Economy Writers
categories.description: Independent writers, newsletters, and reporters who cover creator monetization, platforms, and digital business tools.

outlets.coverageAngle: Infrastructure for creators producing premium visual content
A niche platform serving creators with privacy-sensitive production needs
outlets.notes: Useful if there are creator testimonials.

outlets.coverageAngle: Tools enabling creator operations behind the scenes
What underserved creator segments need from platforms
